title:

body: "Notice relating to: The Clinton Church of England Primary School  URN: 145844  Notice issued to: Alumnis Multi Academy Trust  Reason for issue: Special measures Ofsted judgement  DfE regional director: Lucy Livings  DfE regional director office: South West  Local authority: Devon County Council  "
